s: Convert currencies offline with support for 160+ currencies
d:
Offline Currency Converter is a privacy-focused currency converter app that works offline. Sync exchange rates from the free Frankfurter API and convert currencies even when you're not connected to the internet.

Features:
  • Works completely offline
  • Supports 160+ currencies
  • Automatic exchange rate sync
  • Recent conversion history
  • Material Design 3 interface
This app is free and open source (AGPLv3).
